mapper.select: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS total FROM heritage WHERE category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category ORDER BY total DESC
SELECT id FROM heritage WHERE ccba_kdcd = #{kdcd} AND ccba_asno = #{asno} AND ccba_ctcd = #{ctcd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO heritage_media (heritage_id, url, caption, source) VALUES (#{heritageId}, #{url}, #{caption}, #{source})
INSERT INTO heritage_descriptions (heritage_id, content, depth_level, topic, parent_id, source) VALUES (#{heritageId}, #{content}, #{depthLevel}, #{topic}, #{parentId}, #{source})
mapper.select: SELECT id, heritage_id, content, depth_level, topic, parent_id, source FROM heritage_descriptions WHERE heritage_id = #{heritageId} ORDER BY depth_level
SELECT id, heritage_id, url, caption, source FROM heritage_media WHERE heritage_id = #{heritageId} LIMIT 5
SELECT id, name, name_hanja, category, period, ST_Latitude(location) AS lat, ST_Longitude(location) AS lng, thumbnail_url FROM heritage WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, heritage_id, content, depth_level, topic, parent_id, source FROM heritage_descriptions WHERE heritage_id = #{heritageId} AND source = 'OFFICIAL' AND depth_level = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, name, name_hanja, category, period, ST_Latitude(location) AS lat, ST_Longitude(location) AS lng, thumbnail_url FROM heritage WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT id, name, name_hanja, category, period, ST_Latitude(location) AS lat, ST_Longitude(location) AS lng, ccba_ctcd FROM heritage ORDER BY id

SELECT DISTINCT h.id, h.name, h.category, h.period, ST_Latitude(h.location) AS lat, ST_Longitude(h.location) AS lng, h.ccba_ctcd, h.thumbnail_url FROM heritage h JOIN visit_logs v ON h.id = v.heritage_id WHERE v.trip_id = #{tripId}

SELECT id, name, name_hanja, category, period, ST_Latitude(location) AS lat, ST_Longitude(location) AS lng, thumbnail_url FROM heritage WHERE ST_Distance_Sphere( location, ST_GeomFromText(CONCAT('POINT(', #{lat}, ' ', #{lng}, ')'), 4326) ) <= 500 ORDER BY ST_Distance_Sphere( location, ST_GeomFromText(CONCAT('POINT(', #{lat}, ' ', #{lng}, ')'), 4326) ) LIMIT 5
